message:
fix: update tests for nocgo StatusWarning change and repoPath params

- Update migration_validation_nocgo_test.go to expect StatusWarning/
  "Skipped: requires CGO" (from obsidian MR bd-lars)
- Fix gitignore_test.go: pass "." to all doctor check/fix functions
  that now require repoPath (from opal fix 4bf94cda)
- Add cgo build tag to maintenance_test.go since those tests exercise
  real CGO implementations, not nocgo stubs
